title: Chouchou Refuses to Abandon the Shop
description: On pages 12–15, Chouchou’s loyalty to the pet food shop turns Buggy’s occupation from a pirate threat into a personal wound for the town.
scene: Chouchou refuses to give up the place connected to his owner, while pirates and bystanders react to the dog’s stubborn defense.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No, he's not...

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: He got sick and passed on.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: HE WENT TO THE HOSPITAL THREE MONTHS AGO.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: AWRIGHT, CHOUCHOU...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: you're in charge of the shop while I'm in the hospital.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ruff!

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: The poor thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You mean he's been waiting for his master this whole time?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's what everybody says, but that's not what I think.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Read this way

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: Chou- Chou's a smart dog::

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Chomp Chomp

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I THINK HE KNOWS HIS MASTER IS DEAD.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: THEN WHY DOES HE STILL GUARD THE STORE?

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: This is his master's store...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's his treasure.

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: AND I THINK THAT CHOUCHOU STILL GUARDS THE STORE...

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: ...because it's all that's left of his beloved master.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'VE BEEN TRYING TO GET HIM TO THE SHELTER...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But he won't budge from this spot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: LAP LAP

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: HE'D RATHER STARVE TO DEATH THAN LEAVE HIS POST.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: WHAT'S THAT HORRIBLE ROAR!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I-IT MUST BE MOHJI, THE LION TAMER!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Some- thing's coming this way!

dialogue.speaker: Chouchou
dialogue.text: GIVE ME THAT KEY, DOG!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WURF!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, what have we here...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: HA HA... looks like your friends ABAN- DONED YOU.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: AND AFTER ALL THAT EFFORT TO GET YOU THIS FAR...

summary: This part makes the conflict emotional: Luffy sees that Buggy’s violence is not abstract, but aimed at things people love and protect.
